title: CLAUDE.md build examples use wrong feature names
description: Line 64: 'aws-secrets-manager' is not a real feature flag (correct: 'aws-sm'). Line 65: 'signing' is not a feature flag (correct: 'local-signing'). Agents and contributors following these examples will get 'Package 'secretx' does not have feature 'aws-secrets-manager'' build errors.
